patch.value: Tracks GitHub issue #242: add has-notes/has-learnings/has-files/has-comments/empty-body style filters to pm list and pm search.

value.author: claude-code-agent
value.text: Wired content-field filters (GH-242) into list/list-open/list-all/search + update-many/close-many bulk selection. list family + search: --has-notes/learnings/files/docs/tests/comments/deps/body/linked-command (present) and --no-* (absence via commander negation) plus --empty-body for body-absent and --no-linked-command. resolveContentFieldFilters(options) in list.ts throws USAGE on both-present-and-absent for same field. Applied in list.applyFilters + search.applyFilters via itemMatchesContentFilters; perf path forced (full collections when contentFiltersNeedCollections, WithBody when contentFiltersNeedBody). update-many/close-many use --filter-(has|no)-<field>/--filter-empty-body mapped through shared mapBulkContentAndGovernanceFilters in register-mutation.ts. Active filters echoed in compact+verbose list/search summaries. hasListFilters extended. Tests: new content-governance-filter-resolvers.spec.ts + e2e blocks in metadata-governance-commands.spec.ts. typecheck+specs green.

value.author: claude-code-agent
value.text: Contracts/MCP/docs/completion surface wired for content+governance filters. Added 23 content-presence + 5 governance-missing flags to LIST_FILTER/SEARCH flag-contracts; the filter-prefixed bulk variants (18 content + 5 governance) to UPDATE_MANY/CLOSE_MANY; field-utilization to STATS. MCP: matching params added to TOOL_LIST_FILTER/SEARCH/UPDATE_MANY/CLOSE_MANY option contracts + the stats param-set + new boolean entries in tool-parameter-tables (incl fieldUtilization). Completion: bash auto-derives from contracts; hand-wrote zsh and fish for list/search/update-many/close-many plus bash/zsh/fish stats field-utilization. Docs COMMANDS.md updated (list/search content+governance sections, bulk-ops filter family, stats field_utilization). Tests: extended contracts-command.spec (new contract-surface + MCP-param describe) and completion-command.spec (per-shell flag rendering). typecheck clean; contracts/completion/governance specs green. NOTE for lead: server.ts runStats does not yet forward fieldUtilization (owned by stats agent); run contracts:update to regenerate full.json after all agents merge.

value.author: claude-code-agent
value.text: Coverage gap closure: added in-process tests for the 4 uncovered content-field/governance-filter locations. (1) registration-helpers.spec.ts: 4 tests setting EVERY new content/governance flag to its true trigger + an all-undefined case for both normalizeListOptions and normalizeSearchOptions (lines 540-570/727-754 now full branch). (2) register-commands.spec.ts: in-process update-many/close-many test passing all --filter-has-*/--filter-no-*/--filter-*-missing/--filter-empty-body flags, exercising presence() true-branch (register-mutation.ts:113 now [23,207]). (3) list-command.spec.ts: in-process runList --has-body kept vs --empty-body excluded over a body/no-body pair (list.ts:682 both arms). (4) search-command.spec.ts: in-process runSearch with noted+reviewer item vs bare item; --has-notes and --filter-reviewer-missing each keep one/exclude one (search.ts:923 and :926). Scoped JSON coverage shows no zeros on all targets. Source untouched; 197 tests pass across the 5 extended specs.

patch.value: Shipped content-field existence filters (--has-/--no-* for notes/learnings/files/docs/tests/comments/deps, --has-body/--empty-body, --has-/--no-linked-command) on list/list-open/list-all/search plus --filter-* bulk variants on update-many/close-many. New core/governance/content-fields.ts ContentFieldFilters primitive; list forces heavy/with-body load when content filters need collections/body; MCP param names aligned to ListOptions fields. Full contracts/MCP/docs/completion surface.

Full contracts/MCP/docs/completion surface.
